title: cirsium gaditanum
intro: Cirsium gaditanum, also known as the Gibraltar thistle, is a species of thistle in the family Asteraceae, native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Cirsium gaditanum are said to offer various health benefits, including relief from arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical applications for its soothing and anti-inflammatory properties.
